channel.title: Excalidraw on programmerraja blog
channel.description: Recent content in Excalidraw on programmerraja blog

item.description:
==⚠ Switch to EXCALIDRAW VIEW in the MORE OPTIONS menu of this document. ⚠==

Text Elements

%%

Drawing

{
	"type": "excalidraw",
	"version": 2,
	"source": "https://github.com/zsviczian/obsidian-excalidraw-plugin/releases/tag/2.0.13",
	"elements": [
		{
			"id": "lbilyLsh",
			"type": "text",
			"x": -251,
			"y": -134.0234375,
			"width": 137.2798614501953,
			"height": 25,
			"angle": 0,
			"strokeColor": "#1e1e1e",
			"backgroundColor": "transparent",
			"fillStyle": "solid",
			"strokeWidth": 2,
			"strokeStyle": "solid",
			"roughness": 1,
			"opacity": 100,
			"groupIds": [],
			"frameId": null,
			"roundness": null,
			"seed": 300057372,
			"version": 2,

			"isDeleted": true,
			"boundElements": null,
			"updated": 1705674402817,
			"link": null,
			"locked": false,
			"text": "CTRL+Shift+V",
			"rawText": "CTRL+Shift+V",
			"fontSize": 20,
			"fontFamily": 1,
			"textAlign": "left",
			"verticalAlign": "top",
			"baseline": 18,
			"containerId": null,
			"originalText": "CTRL+Shift+V",
			"lineHeight": 1.25
		}
	],
	"appState": {
		"theme": "light",
		"viewBackgroundColor": "#ffffff",
		"currentItemStrokeColor": "#1e1e1e",
		"currentItemBackgroundColor": "transparent",
		"currentItemFillStyle": "solid",

		"currentItemStartArrowhead": null,
		"currentItemEndArrowhead": "arrow",
		"scrollX": 511,

		"zoom": {
			"value": 1

		"gridSize": null,

	"files": {}
}
